prompt: Create a polished anime-style group portrait of exactly five original girls posing together inside a warm, softly lit café at night, with blurred chalkboard menus, shelves, pendant lights, and golden bokeh in the background. Use a wide horizontal 3:2 composition, close-up waist-to-knee framing, soft cinematic lighting, detailed glossy hair, delicate line art, pastel pink and white palette, high-detail clothing folds, and a cheerful “group photo” feeling. The five visible characters are, from left to right: 1) a tall fox/oni-inspired girl with very long white twin-tail hair, two tall curved horns fading from ivory to red, foxlike ears, pink-and-blue heterochromia, cherry blossom hair ornaments, and a white kimono with magenta hakama-style skirt, black and red obi, and sakura patterns; 2) a tall elegant girl with long straight pale pink-white hair, round glasses, blue-and-pink heterochromia, wearing a pale pink floral kimono and teal obi, smiling gently; 3) a small cat-eared girl in the front center, jumping or being lifted with arms spread wide, pale pink hair in a small bun, cat ears, white blouse with black ribbon and buttons, salmon-pink skirt, white socks and black Mary Jane shoes, with her face covered by a flat opaque pale pink square censor block; 4) a shy short-haired girl slightly behind center-right with fluffy pale pink-white bob hair, one blue eye and one golden eye, blue hair accent on one side, wearing an oversized white hoodie and holding it close to her face; 5) a frilly gothic-lolita girl on the far right with long white twin tails tied with large black bows, wearing a white lace dress with black ribbon details, ruffles, layered skirt, and delicate accessories, with her face covered by a flat opaque pale pink square censor block. Make everyone lean inward as if taking a cute commemorative photo, with the center child’s outstretched arms overlapping the others. Keep the café background warmly blurred and do not add captions, logos, or extra characters. Customizable details: five pastel white-haired original anime girls, warm cozy café interior at night, white, blush pink, magenta, black, and warm amber, cute cheerful group photo, pale dusty pink.
